page_metadata.biotools__summary: A systems biology tool for analyzing metabolomic data. It automatically superimposes raw metabolomic data onto metabolic pathways and integrates it with transcriptomic and proteomic data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A systems biology tool for analyzing metabolomic data. It automatically superimposes raw metabolomic data onto metabolic pathways and integrates it with transcriptomic and proteomic data.
